text: The environment shifts from a sterile, orderly meeting room—bathed in white light and anticipation—to a vibrant, stimulating wall of research and development, bursting with color and layered meaning. I feel the contrast between emptiness awaiting purpose and a celebration of innovation. Here, the transition makes me reflect on how knowledge is both preserved in silent rooms and dynamically born in spaces alive with curiosity. I sense a quiet pull toward the unknown, tinged with excitement and slight disorientation. Here, I am both observer and participant at the intersection of thought and action.
